title: Mark Castiglione
compiled_truth: Mark Castiglione is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-29 to 2001-05-14), Mark Castiglione sent 18 and received 85 emails, totalling 103 interactions.
